## Meeting Purpose

[Discuss Dave's potential role at Growth X and provide deeper insights into the company's operations, vision, and growth trajectory.](https://fathom.video/share/_MXgVpvxEQ8hb6Ks2cynrzkz94n6CuV-?tab=summary&timestamp=120.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [Growth X, founded in April 2023, has rapidly grown to 35 clients and a robust pipeline, securing Series A funding from Madrona Venture Group](https://fathom.video/share/_MXgVpvxEQ8hb6Ks2cynrzkz94n6CuV-?tab=summary&timestamp=239.0)
  - [The company aims to revolutionize content creation and marketing through AI-powered workflows, targeting $122M revenue by 2027](https://fathom.video/share/_MXgVpvxEQ8hb6Ks2cynrzkz94n6CuV-?tab=summary&timestamp=665.0)
  - [Dave is being considered for a "mini CEO" Managing Director role, responsible for client success, team management, and product development input](https://fathom.video/share/_MXgVpvxEQ8hb6Ks2cynrzkz94n6CuV-?tab=summary&timestamp=770.0)
  - [Growth X's approach combines AI automation with expert oversight, focusing on content strategy, link building, and expanding into other business functions](https://fathom.video/share/_MXgVpvxEQ8hb6Ks2cynrzkz94n6CuV-?tab=summary&timestamp=977.0)

## Topics

### Company Background and Growth

  - [Founded in April 2023, transferred assets to new C-Corp in January 2024](https://fathom.video/share/_MXgVpvxEQ8hb6Ks2cynrzkz94n6CuV-?tab=summary&timestamp=320.0)
  - [Currently has 35 active clients and \~60 deals in pipeline](https://fathom.video/share/_MXgVpvxEQ8hb6Ks2cynrzkz94n6CuV-?tab=summary&timestamp=240.0)
  - [Secured Series A funding from Madrona Venture Group after rigorous due diligence](https://fathom.video/share/_MXgVpvxEQ8hb6Ks2cynrzkz94n6CuV-?tab=summary&timestamp=271.0)
  - [Projecting rapid growth: $22M revenue in 2024, aiming for $122M by 2027](https://fathom.video/share/_MXgVpvxEQ8hb6Ks2cynrzkz94n6CuV-?tab=summary&timestamp=675.0)
  - [Potential for high valuation multiples (30-60x) based on current trajectory](https://fathom.video/share/_MXgVpvxEQ8hb6Ks2cynrzkz94n6CuV-?tab=summary&timestamp=723.0)

### Business Model and Technology

  - [Three-phase approach:](https://fathom.video/share/_MXgVpvxEQ8hb6Ks2cynrzkz94n6CuV-?tab=summary&timestamp=336.0)
    1.  AI-powered content creation with expert oversight
    2.  Developing internal platform and media apps
    3.  Expanding into other business functions (HR, finance, etc.)
  - [Building proprietary AI workflows and coding agents for efficiency](https://fathom.video/share/_MXgVpvxEQ8hb6Ks2cynrzkz94n6CuV-?tab=summary&timestamp=366.0)
  - [Developing evaluation and model training capabilities](https://fathom.video/share/_MXgVpvxEQ8hb6Ks2cynrzkz94n6CuV-?tab=summary&timestamp=383.0)
  - [Creating reusable components and exposing some as paid apps/SaaS offerings](https://fathom.video/share/_MXgVpvxEQ8hb6Ks2cynrzkz94n6CuV-?tab=summary&timestamp=409.0)

### Role and Expectations for Dave

  - ["Mini CEO" / Managing Director position](https://fathom.video/share/_MXgVpvxEQ8hb6Ks2cynrzkz94n6CuV-?tab=summary&timestamp=770.0)
  - [Responsible for landing, managing, and expanding client relationships](https://fathom.video/share/_MXgVpvxEQ8hb6Ks2cynrzkz94n6CuV-?tab=summary&timestamp=780.0)
  - [Expected to contribute to product development and workflow improvements](https://fathom.video/share/_MXgVpvxEQ8hb6Ks2cynrzkz94n6CuV-?tab=summary&timestamp=848.0)
  - [Autonomy to pursue growth strategies (e.g., targeting specific industries)](https://fathom.video/share/_MXgVpvxEQ8hb6Ks2cynrzkz94n6CuV-?tab=summary&timestamp=868.0)
  - [No strict sales targets; focus on reputation and client success to drive growth](https://fathom.video/share/_MXgVpvxEQ8hb6Ks2cynrzkz94n6CuV-?tab=summary&timestamp=935.0)

### Challenges and Opportunities

  - [Balancing client expectations with efficient execution](https://fathom.video/share/_MXgVpvxEQ8hb6Ks2cynrzkz94n6CuV-?tab=summary&timestamp=977.0)
  - [Need for high-level expertise to guide strategy and overcome client hesitations](https://fathom.video/share/_MXgVpvxEQ8hb6Ks2cynrzkz94n6CuV-?tab=summary&timestamp=1147.0)
  - [Opportunity to leverage AI for link building and outreach campaigns](https://fathom.video/share/_MXgVpvxEQ8hb6Ks2cynrzkz94n6CuV-?tab=summary&timestamp=1313.0)
  - [Potential to develop a "karma system" for link exchanges among clients](https://fathom.video/share/_MXgVpvxEQ8hb6Ks2cynrzkz94n6CuV-?tab=summary&timestamp=1353.0)

### Content Strategy and Performance

  - [Typical 3-month timeline from content creation to ranking](https://fathom.video/share/_MXgVpvxEQ8hb6Ks2cynrzkz94n6CuV-?tab=summary&timestamp=1462.0)
  - [Focus on publication rate, quality, and momentum in first phase](https://fathom.video/share/_MXgVpvxEQ8hb6Ks2cynrzkz94n6CuV-?tab=summary&timestamp=1486.0)
  - [Monitor indexing and impressions in second phase](https://fathom.video/share/_MXgVpvxEQ8hb6Ks2cynrzkz94n6CuV-?tab=summary&timestamp=1500.0)
  - [Optimize for clicks and conversions in third phase](https://fathom.video/share/_MXgVpvxEQ8hb6Ks2cynrzkz94n6CuV-?tab=summary&timestamp=1559.0)
  - [Success story: Client saw significant organic growth even after churning](https://fathom.video/share/_MXgVpvxEQ8hb6Ks2cynrzkz94n6CuV-?tab=summary&timestamp=1533.0)

## Next Steps

  - [Marcel to send more details about the role and offer to Dave](https://fathom.video/share/_MXgVpvxEQ8hb6Ks2cynrzkz94n6CuV-?tab=summary&timestamp=1885.0)
  - [Schedule follow-up discussion to address any remaining questions](https://fathom.video/share/_MXgVpvxEQ8hb6Ks2cynrzkz94n6CuV-?tab=summary&timestamp=1994.0)
  - [Explore potential start date and onboarding process for Dave](https://fathom.video/share/_MXgVpvxEQ8hb6Ks2cynrzkz94n6CuV-?tab=summary&timestamp=1994.0)
  - [Discuss specific client accounts or projects Dave might oversee initially](https://fathom.video/share/_MXgVpvxEQ8hb6Ks2cynrzkz94n6CuV-?tab=summary&timestamp=2014.0)

Text Dave at 904-451-7204 to initiate communication
Share additional company/role details with Dave between upcoming meetings
